strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development
Strong background in scalable systems and high-performance architectures
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
Primary stack lacks Kotlin/Java backend experience for select services
Recent employment history shows frequent job changes (every 2-3 years)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript and Node.js, along with valuable AI-agent infrastructure experience that aligns with the role's emerging technology focus. His deep expertise in scalable systems and high-performance architectures is a significant asset. However, his limited direct experience with Nest.js and recent job-hopping pattern raise some concerns about long-term fit and technical stack alignment.
